title: LuckyDiceMod-Forge
description: A lucky dice mod with various interesting effects after use
body: A lucky dice, suitable for server entertainment, non-destructive ## ✨ characteristic - ⚡ Each roll of dice may trigger different events - 💥 From lucky rewards to explosion traps, everything is available! - 🧩 Supports Foegr 1.20.1 version and also supports servers - ✅ Easy to use, ready to install ## 🚀 Quick start 1. Put 'LuckyDiceMod' into your 'mods' folder 2. Launch the game and right-click to use the dice to start your lucky journey! ## ✨ recipes
